extraction.one_line_summary: GANA Filippo soloed from a 3-man break remnant with 7km to go on the descent, winning by 34 seconds while THOMAS attacked the GC group with 20km left on the 24km climb.
tactical_patterns: THOMAS attacked with 20km remaining on 24km climb, forcing ALMEIDA/GC to respond mid-climb rather than at summit.
GANA recognized cooperation breakdown in 3-man break, attacked on descent with 7km left when gaps already visible.
KELDERMAN dropped on final climb despite being only 48 seconds down, revealing vulnerability on long shallow gradients.

rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: positive: attacked GC group with 10k climbing still remaining, forcing tempo increase mid-ascent
rider_signals.GANA Filippo: positive: first non-TT victory, showed ability to recognize tactical moment and execute solo descent
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: dropped on 24km climb despite being close on GC, concerning for long mountain stages
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: positive: extended GC lead to 43 seconds after responding to THOMAS attack, took bonus seconds at finish
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: positive: took bonus seconds at finish despite not being in early break, smart positioning
